posts.title: Humanoid Robots in 2026: The Buyer Map for Factory, Warehouse, Home, and Research
posts.excerpt: Humanoid robots are splitting into factory, warehouse, research, and home lanes. This robologai guide explains how to compare the market without getting lost in demo hype.
posts.body: The humanoid robot market is no longer one simple scoreboard. The full buyer map is published as a canonical robologai article so readers can open the complete analysis, sources, and comparison links from the homepage.

posts.title: peaq and the Machine Economy: Why DePIN Matters for Robots and Physical AI
posts.excerpt: A robologai deep dive into peaq, DePIN, DePAI, Machine DeFi, Machine RWAs, and onchain coordination for robots and devices.
posts.body: A canonical robologai article on machine economy infrastructure, DePIN, and the coordination layer that may connect robots, devices, and physical AI systems.

posts.title: Physical AI Explained: When Intelligence Leaves the Screen
posts.excerpt: A simple guide to embodied AI, humanoid robots, teleoperation, simulation, and machine labor.
posts.body: A canonical robologai guide explaining physical AI, embodied intelligence, robots, simulation, teleoperation, and the move from software-only intelligence into the physical world.

posts.title: Welcome to the Robologai Admin Desk
posts.excerpt: This is the first editable post source for the Robologai CMS test. Future blog and news posts can be added from the admin panel.
posts.body: This post is stored in `content/posts.json`. When the file is updated and Cloudflare Pages publishes the site, the post appears automatically.\n\nThe goal is simple: publish lightweight blog and news updates without preparing a new zip package every time.
